steps.title: Locate the answered question
steps.content: The passage directly asks why y'all has become more popular, then answers by explaining that many English varieties lack a dedicated plural form of you. Because y'all always refers to more than one person, it can express meaning more precisely.

steps.title: Reject questions not addressed
steps.content:
• Choice A asks for a count of other plural forms, which the passage never provides.
  • Choice B asks about first recorded use, but the passage does not discuss origin dates.
  • Choice C asks about regions outside the US, while the passage stays within US usage.
The answer is D.
